# 🤝 Contributing to AvatarSMP

First off, thank you for taking the time to contribute and help make **AvatarSMP** better!

---

> ⚠️ **Project License Notice**  
> **AvatarSMP** is published under an **All Rights Reserved (ARR)** license.  
> Direct code contributions (Pull Requests) are strictly restricted or evaluated on a case-by-case basis. However, **reporting bugs and proposing new features** is highly encouraged and greatly appreciated!

---

## 🐛 Reporting Bugs

Found an issue or a bug in the plugin? Help us fix it by opening an issue!

Before submitting a bug report:
1. **Check existing issues** to make sure the bug hasn't already been reported.
2. Ensure you are using the **latest official release** of AvatarSMP.

### How to Submit a Good Bug Report
* Navigate to the **[Issues](https://github.com/PIWK0-bip/AvatarSMP-Plugin/issues)** tab and click **New Issue**.
* Choose the **Bug Report** template.
* Provide a clear and descriptive title.
* Include detailed steps to reproduce the bug.
* Attach server logs/stacktraces and your server environment details (e.g. Paper 1.20.4, Java 17).

---

## 💡 Suggesting Features & Enhancements

Have an awesome idea for a new bending ability, command, or config setting?

1. Go to the **[Issues](https://github.com/PIWK0-bip/AvatarSMP-Plugin/issues)** tab.
2. Select the **Feature Request** template.
3. Clearly describe the feature, why you think it would be useful, and how you imagine it working in-game.

---

## 🛠️ Pull Requests & Code Submissions

Because this is a proprietary project:
* **Unsolicited PRs:** Pull Requests sent without prior discussion may be closed automatically.
* **Proposing Changes:** If you want to contribute code, please **reach out first** via Discord or by creating a feature request issue to discuss the proposed implementation.

---

## 💬 Need Help?

If you have questions about setup, configuration, or need support:
* **Discord:** Contact `PIWK0__bip` directly.
* **GitHub Discussions / Issues:** Open a ticket for bug inquiries.
